## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content marketing proposal for Redis and negotiate terms and pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposed a comprehensive content strategy and execution plan, initially priced at $330-350k annually](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Redis expressed budget constraints and need for clearer ROI projections](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to reduce scope by removing programmatic SEO, bringing cost to \~$18k/month](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Redis requested more concrete performance metrics and customer references before moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

## Topics

### Proposal Scope and Pricing

  - [Initial proposal included 3 main content lanes: net new editorial, programmatic SEO, and content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Original pricing was $330-350k annually, reduced from initial $40k/month for sprint and $30k/month for execution](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to remove programmatic SEO, bringing cost down to \~$18k/month](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Redis currently spends $7-10k/month on an SEO agency and $2k/month on Profound](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution

  - [GrowthX aims to publish 5 pieces of content per week, separate from refresh efforts](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Strategy includes both SEO and AI-driven content optimization (GEO)](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes daily content publishing and refreshing to stay competitive](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Team includes experienced professionals like former TechCrunch editor and TripAdvisor SEO lead](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)

### ROI and Performance Metrics

  - [GrowthX provided projections based on keyword difficulty and potential traffic increases](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Redis requested more concrete metrics on expected impact on traffic, leads, and revenue](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [GrowthX highlighted 1,100% brand visibility increase for client Augment Code in 9 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Difficulty quantifying exact ROI due to evolving nature of AI-driven search (GEO)](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)

### Redis's Current Position and Needs

  - [Redis has 95% unaided brand awareness in their space](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Need to grow organically in new AI-related categories (e.g., vector databases)](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Current content team updating only \~5 pages per quarter](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Large existing site with 1,300 pages needing refresh and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

### GrowthX's Value Proposition

  - [Blend of AI-powered platform and human expertise for faster, more efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Ability to handle high volumes of technical content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)
  - [Integrated strategy, execution, and optimization across SEO and AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Potential cost savings compared to building equivalent in-house capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send updated SOW without programmatic SEO, targeting \~$18k/month](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide additional customer references for Redis to review](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=2723.0)
  - [Redis to evaluate budget allocation and potential trade-offs to fund the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=2539.0)
  - [Both parties to reconvene after Redis reviews updated proposal and references](https://fathom.video/share/f7Bm5BesSbb5rsgLEnJBmK4tLhmgK5RY?tab=summary&timestamp=2723.0)
